title: oberna behen subsp. prostrata
intro: Oberna behen subsp. prostrata, also known as creeping Oberna, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a creeping, herbaceous perennial with medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal health. Oberna behen subsp. prostrata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin conditions.
